recommendations.title: Act of Valor
recommendations.overview: When a covert mission to rescue a kidnapped CIA operative uncovers a chilling plot, an elite, highly trained U.S. SEAL team speeds to hotspots around the globe, racing against the clock to stop a deadly terrorist attack.

recommendations.title: Narco Sub
recommendations.overview: A former U.S. Navy Seal is forced to become the international criminal he once fought against when a powerful and violent drug cartel kidnaps his wife and daughter.

recommendations.title: Inazuma Eleven the Movie: The Ultimate Force, Team Ogre, Attacks!
recommendations.overview: An organization in the future sends the specially trained Team Ogre to defeat Endou Mamoru and his team, to prevent him from influencing the world with his soccer.

recommendations.title: Monsters, Inc.

recommendations.title: Space Jam
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: With their freedom on the line, the Looney Tunes seek the help of NBA superstar Michael Jordan to win a basketball game against a team of moronic aliens.

recommendations.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
recommendations.overview: An elite Navy SEAL uncovers an international conspiracy while seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Seal Team Eight: Behind Enemy Lines
recommendations.overview: Seal Team Eight must fight their way deep into Africa's Congo, decommission a secret uranium mine, and stop our most dangerous enemy from smuggling weapon's grade yellow-cake out of the country.

recommendations.title: Navy Seals vs. Zombies
